layout_and_spacing.geometry: Sharp edges only. Apply 'rounded-none' globally. NO curved or rounded corners.
layout_and_spacing.section_breaks: Diagonal section breaks using clip-path (e.g., clip-path: polygon(0 0, 100% 5vw, 100% 100%, 0 calc(100% - 5vw)))
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Generous, cinematic spacing. p-8, p-16, py-24, py-32.
layout_and_spacing.letterbox: Include fixed top and bottom black bars (h-12 or h-16) with z-[100] to create a cinematic 2.35:1 aspect ratio layout on the viewport.

visual_effects.film_grain: A fixed full-screen div with pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay or mix-blend-screen, containing a noisy SVG or CSS grain texture, with opacity around 20-30%.
visual_effects.glitch_text: Hero text must feature CSS keyframe glitch animations (RGB split effect using text-shadow with teal #1de0cc and crimson #c0392b).
visual_effects.custom_cursor: Global custom cursor. Hide default cursor (cursor-none on body). Custom div following mouse pointer, styled like a film reel crosshair or minimal gold dot with a hollow outer circle.
visual_effects.scrollbar: Custom slim scrollbar styling in CSS. Track: #050505, Thumb: #c9a84c (gold).
visual_effects.text_selection: Global text selection styling: ::selection { background-color: #c9a84c; color: #050505; }

components.navbar: Sticky, z-50 (positioned below the top letterbox bar). backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/60, minimal typography.
components.hero: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Glitch text. Parallax background image. Dramatic lighting/dark overlay using bg-black/60 to let text pop.
components.horizontal_rail: Netflix-style horizontal scrolling container for 'Upcoming Films'. Use SwiperJS or Framer Motion horizontal drag. Hide default scrollbars. Hover scale effect (z-index increase, scale-105).
components.3d_tilt_cards: Use react-parallax-tilt or framer-motion to create subtle 3D rotation on mouse movement for 'Team Members'.
components.events_tabs: Minimalist raw HTML/Tailwind tabs. Active state text: Gold (#c9a84c), bordered bottom. Inactive: Dim white (#a0998e).
components.film_ticker: Marquee / Infinite horizontal scroll of film reviews ('Naqaab Picks'). Use react-fast-marquee. Font: Space Mono.
components.member_portal: Implement simple localStorage-based Auth form. Dark minimalist inputs with bottom borders only.
components.buttons: Flat, rectangular (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#c9a84c] text-[#050505] hover:bg-white. Secondary: border border-[#c9a84c] text-[#c9a84c] hover:bg-[#c9a84c]/10.

image_urls.description: Close up of a cinema camera lens. Great for parallax hero background.
Black video camera with slider, ideal for the 'About the Club' section imagery.
Film director holding a light on set, perfect for member portal or events.
Director near video camera, use as a placeholder for a film poster in the Netflix rail.
Director in chair, another placeholder for the film posters.

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements must use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided: #050505 (bg), #0d0d0d (cards), #c9a84c (gold accent), #1de0cc (teal accent).
Ensure all fonts are imported via the Google Fonts URL and applied. 'Bebas Neue' for main headings, 'Playfair Display' for subheadings.
Implement a custom cinematic cursor that hides the default one.
Add a fixed 'film grain' overlay with pointer-events-none over the entire layout.
Ensure 'rounded-none' is heavily used across the board. No curves.
Implement the custom glitch effect for the hero text using CSS keyframes or Framer Motion.
Integrate the letterbox bars at the top and bottom (fixed black bars h-12 or h-16).
Build a Member Portal with localStorage-based Auth.
Build a Netflix-style Swiper rail for 'Upcoming Films'.
Include a 'Naqaab Picks' infinite horizontal film review ticker.
Add an 'Interest Form Modal' triggered from call-to-actions.

If the custom user logo/header assets are not immediately available as local files, structure the layout using the provided fallback 'hero_background' from Unsplash, and style the wordmark font 'ArabDances' as a text fallback for the logo.
